reviews.review_body: Kids get corporal punishment, I doubt if teachers are trined, they don't have basic manners, which is a big concern, how can they nurture kids, washrooms are pathetic, if u hate u r kid then join them there... No commonsense in most of the teachers... Worst school in Hyderabad

reviews.school_name: G Pulla Reddy Memorial School - Dilsukhnagar
reviews.author: Iam Notimportant
reviews.review_body: Literally the worst cbse school ever. My centre fell there and the benches in the class room take up 90% of it. The metal benches hurt your back when you lean back. You have to bend to reach your desk. I can't even talk about the neatness. The bathroom are disgusting and urine is all over the floor. Spider webs fall down from the ceiling of the classroom. One of the sports faculty is so rude he insulted me and my school teacher verbally in front of the gate for wearing an analogue watch for the exam.

reviews.school_name: G Pulla Reddy Memorial School - Dilsukhnagar
reviews.author: katravath Ramdas
reviews.review_body:
మి పిల్లలను  ఈ స్కూల్లో జైన్ చేయాలనుకుంటున్నార ఐతే తుర్పుకు దండం పెట్టి వెలిపొండి. ఏందుకు అంటె విద్యా బోధన యేవిదంగా విద్యార్తులను తీర్చి దిద్దల్నో తెలియని పరిస్థితిలో  teacher and principal.
Worst school teacher and principal

reviews.author: rohini shekar
reviews.review_body: Worst management and irrespective response from front office that lady and she dnt knw min proper basic english nd dnt knw how to speak in mannered way. I dnt knw in what basis the management recruited her...???? Very lazy lady better to fire her and recruit proper active responsible candidate...  I went for new admission and didn't get proper information from that lady... I have good opinion on pulla Reddy school and by that lady it turned out messy.... Plz maintain proper management... Don't loose your school reputation by this worse employees.... Better to hire Male candidate for front office...

reviews.school_name: G Pulla Reddy Memorial School - Dilsukhnagar
reviews.author: Jwiteshhh
reviews.review_body: Principal of this school/college is literally the last person you would trust your child with. I have my cousins studying over there right now and they recently went out for a trip the students asked her the permission to bring their mobiles/phone's to the trip she said ok it's fine get them. On the morning of the trip she took their phones and didn't even go on the trip she has all their phones with her even right now 2 days after the trip! What does she think of herself? Who is she to take away their belongings and keep them with her? We could easily file a complaint but it would become a bigger case and she could even punish all the students who went on the trip just because they complained to the higher officials about this. IDC ABOUT ALL THIS I'LL DEFINITELY DO SOMETHING ABOUT THIS COLLEGE AFTER MY COUSIN IS DONE STUDYING THERE.
